ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent where the country is located */,
  "status" TEXT /* Development status of the country (e.g., Developing, Developed) */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "official_language" TEXT /* Official language of the country */,
  "area_km2" REAL /* Area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the country (people per square kilometer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health indicator record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country for which the indicators apply */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the record */,
  "life_expectancy" REAL /* Life expectancy at birth */,
  "adult_mortality" INTEGER /* Adult mortality rate */,
  "infant_deaths" INTEGER /* Number of infant deaths */,
  "alcohol" REAL /* Alcohol consumption per capita */,
  "percentage_expenditure" REAL /* Percentage of total expenditure on health */,
  "hepatitis_b" INTEGER /* Hepatitis B vaccination coverage */,
  "measles" INTEGER /* Number of measles cases */,
  "bmi" REAL /* Body Mass Index (BMI) */,
  "under_five_deaths" INTEGER /* Number of under-five deaths */,
  "polio" INTEGER /* Polio vaccination coverage */,
  "total_expenditure" REAL /* Total health expenditure */,
  "diphtheria" INTEGER /* Diphtheria vaccination coverage */,
  "hiv_aids" REAL /* HIV/AIDS prevalence */,
  "gdp" REAL /* Gross Domestic Product (GDP) */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "smoking_prevalence" REAL /* Percentage of the population that smokes */,
  "obesity_rate" REAL /* Percentage of the population with obesity */,
  "mental_health_prevalence" REAL /* Percentage of the population with mental health issues */,
  "healthcare_workers_per_1000" REAL /* Number of healthcare workers per 1000 people */,
  "urban_population_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the population living in urban areas */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_indicators_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "expenditures" (
  "expenditure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expenditure record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country associated with the expenditure */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the expenditure record */,
  "total_expenditure" REAL /* Total health expenditure */,
  "percentage_expenditure" REAL /* Percentage of total health expenditure */,
  "public_expenditure" REAL /* Total public health expenditure */,
  "private_expenditure" REAL /* Total private health expenditure */,
  "out_of_pocket_expenditure" REAL /* Out-of-pocket health expenditure */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expenditure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expenditures_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gdp_data" (
  "gdp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each GDP record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country associated with the GDP data */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the GDP record */,
  "gdp" REAL /* Gross Domestic Product (GDP) of the country */,
  "gdp_per_capita" REAL /* GDP per capita */,
  "gdp_growth_rate" REAL /* GDP growth rate (percent) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gdp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gdp_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_data" (
  "population_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country associated with the population data */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the population record */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "birth_rate" REAL /* Birth rate (per 1000 people) */,
  "death_rate" REAL /* Death rate (per 1000 people) */,
  "median_age" REAL /* Median age of the population */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("population_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
